strengths: Proven experience with event-driven architectures and distributed systems, demonstrated through GISCollective and high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby Media
Hands-on technical leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Strong background in real-time systems and low-latency applications, evidenced by work at Dunnhumby Media and RIDE Capital
concerns: Limited direct production experience with agentic AI systems in regulated or fintech environments, with most AI work focused on tooling rather than commercial multi-agent systems
Lack of demonstrated fintech-specific expertise (e.g., credit risk, working-capital management, or embedded finance), which is a key requirement for the role
No clear track record of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people or establishing senior technical leadership layers
response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth in event-driven architectures, distributed systems, and some AI tooling, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI systems operating in regulated fintech environments or scaling engineering teams to the required size. His fintech exposure is minimal, and his most recent roles focus on general software engineering rather than the specialized competencies needed for this executive position.
